titleStmt.title: SII 39.7: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 7. (A.R. No. 7 of 1916.) SUGANDALAI, TIRUCHCHENDUR TALUK, TINNEVELLY DISTRICT. IḌAIVIṈAITĪRTA-PERUMĀL TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. ••••••••••

summary.p: This inscription contains the message that at the request of Kāliṅgarāyaṉ, the king renovated the temple of Tirunārayaṇa-viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ, and setup the image of Garjārchchaṇai Āḻvār in it. Also it mentions the signatories like Toṇḍaimāṉ and Pallavarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī prasādañ ceytaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi hmadeyam civantalaiyāṉa tirunārāyaṇac caturvyeti
maṅkalattu sabhaikkum Ikkoyil taṉmañ ceytu koṭupotukiṟa Ivvūr kā kkaruḷ ceytapirāṉ dāsaṇukkum Ivvūr tirunārāyaṇa viṇṇaka
r Emporumāṉ koyilil nampu ceyvārkaḷukkum Ikkoyil jirṇikkaiyāle jirṇondhāraṇam paṇṇap peṟa veṇumeṉṟu namakkuk kāliṅkarāyar (co)ṉṉamaiyi
l namakkup poruntu nāḷile jarṇṇoddhāraṇamum paṇṇit tiruvācikai ter nālmukaccaṭṭam paccaik kutirai Uṭpaṭak koṇṭu vaiykācit tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Ivvāṇaikkaruḷ
ceyta pirāṉ dāsaṉ janmanakṣatramāṉa puṇarpūcattile tirttamākavuñ coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu ka[jā]rccaṇai Āḻvāraiyum Uḷḷepukkaruḷavum paṇṇi mu
ṉpu pratiṣṭhai paṇṇi sāmākāyaṉaṅ koṇṭu potukiṟa Āḻvārait tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷivikka Ippaṭi colluvatākak kurukularāyaṉṉaṭaippil ciṟukkaṉkaḷaip potak kāṭṭac co
ṉṉom Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu nāḷ 2 100 2 10 5 ṉāl paḻantiparāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ittirumukappaṭi kalveṭṭiṉom Ivvū cilppācā
riyaṉ cāttaṉ Āṉatavarākaḻallāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya Ācāriyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakaṉ veṇkāṭaṉṉāṉa kuṭanāṭṭu Ācāriyaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
